Describe the sequence of events involving the hookah and the people around it throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a red hookah sits on a table before seated women; at 4s, a woman exhales a cloud of white smoke near the hookah; at 8s, the woman holds the hookah hose while seated; at 10s, the hookah disappears and the man gestures with his hands; at 16s, the man stands alone gesturing near wall art.

question: Describe the actions and positioning of the man in the white t-shirt as the video progresses.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in a white t-shirt stands next to a booth; at 4s, he stands on the right side while others smoke; at 10s, he gestures with his right hand on the booth backrest; at 16s, he gestures with hands in front of his chest near a painting; at 18s, the scene clears and he disappears.
